what: XCD-aware PID remap in stage1 plus stage2 num_warps=1 for the v123 Triton path
why: MQA makes 16 heads share the same KV tiles, but the default stage1 launch order spreads those heads across XCDs and defeats L2 locality. Remapping program IDs can keep head groups that read the same KV lines on the same XCD. Pairing that with num_warps=1 for stage2 trims a lightweight reduction kernel that previously looked neutral in isolation, but may help once stage1 stops dominating as hard.
